<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1. Under {{< fa cube >}} Inventory, select **Inventory Record Stages**.

1. Click on the inventory record type you want to add stages for.^[[Manage inventory record types](/guide/inventory/manage-inventory-record-types.qmd)]

1. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Stage**.

1. Provide a stage **Name** and a stage **Description**, then assign a **Color** to the stage.

1. When you are done, click **Save** to apply your changes.

::::


:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1. Under {{< fa cube >}} Inventory, select **Inventory Record Stages**.

1. Click on the [inventory record type](/guide/inventory/manage-inventory-record-types.qmd){target="_blank"} you want to add stages for.

1. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Stage**.

1. Provide a stage **Name** and a stage **Description**, then assign a **Color** to the stage.

1. When you are done, click **Save** to apply your changes.

::::
